news.headline: Together AI raises $800M Series C at $8.3B valuation
news.detail: The AI infrastructure company, which lets enterprises train and run models on open-source platforms, reported over $1.15 billion in annual bookings with backing from Aramco Ventures, Nvidia, and Vista Equity.

news.headline: Taktile secures $110M for agentic AI in finance
news.detail: Goldman Sachs-led round backs the platform automating loan approvals, fraud detection, and claims processing for banks while preserving human oversight and audit trails in regulated workflows.

news.headline: AI agents shift from hype to real workflows
news.detail: Industry reports confirm 2026 marks the pivot from exploratory AI to measurable business outcomes, with companies now demanding concrete ROI metrics and deploying agents in mission-critical processes with proper governance.

news.headline: Bespoke Labs raises $40M for AI testing infrastructure
news.detail: Wing VC-led Series A funds synthetic data generation and evaluation platforms that let AI agents safely learn through large-scale simulation before production deployment.
